mapper.sql: id, order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity, subtotal, image_url, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_order_item (order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity, subtotal, image_url, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{dishId}, #{dishName}, #{price}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal}, #{imageUrl}, #{createTime})

INSERT INTO tb_order_item (order_id, dish_id, dish_name, price, quantity, subtotal, image_url, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.dishName}, #{item.price}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.subtotal}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.createTime})
